title: ephemerantha labangensis
intro: Ephemerantha labangensis, also known as the "Tongkat Ali" plant, is a species of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia and Indonesia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ephemerantha labangensis include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced immune function, and increased energy levels, as well as potential benefits for weight management and improved fertility. In herbal preparations, the root of the plant is often used to make infusions, capsules, and extracts, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
